title: Conington and Holme Internal Drainage Board: reconstitution
body: "This notice makes provision for the following:   the reconstitution of the Conington and Holme Internal Drainage Board so as to reduce the number of elected members from 8 to 6, and to abolish the Electoral divisions of the Internal Drainage Districts to form a single District matters supplemental to or consequential on that reconstitution   You can request a copy of the scheme or make representations. "

taxons.title: River maintenance, flooding and coastal erosion
